data.name: Hold Me Tight All Night, Onii-chan!
data.detailed_description:
The Onami girls' endlessly affectionate brother developed asthma at a young age, which left him bedridden for much of his early life. Now that his health has improved, he does his best to make up for lost time through online learning. His medical researcher parents have used the unique opportunity his illness provides to gather data about his condition, which has greatly contributed to medical science. As a result, they've encouraged him to get plenty of sleep and lead a calm, relaxing life so that he'll make for a better research subject and help people all over the world. However, those same parents throw a wrench into his peaceful life when they come up with an idea to boost immunity through hugging. Now every evening he has to choose one of his sisters to hug! What will Onii-chan do when faced with this sudden and weighty responsibility?

Embark into the world of sisterly love and tight hugs in this beautifully drawn visual novel! The rich story will keep you captivated as you navigate through the individual character stories.
data.about_the_game:
The Onami girls' endlessly affectionate brother developed asthma at a young age, which left him bedridden for much of his early life. Now that his health has improved, he does his best to make up for lost time through online learning. However, those same parents throw a wrench into his peaceful life when they come up with an idea to boost immunity through hugging. Now every evening he has to choose one of his sisters to hug! What will Onii-chan do when faced with this sudden and weighty responsibility?

Embark into the world of sisterly love and tight hugs in this beautifully drawn visual novel! The rich story will keep you captivated as you navigate through the individual character stories.
data.short_description: When two researchers are desperate to find a way to help their sickly son, they come up with a unique course of treatment... by hugging!
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and NekoNyan, All Rights Reserved.
